text.message: Naw I just didn’t want u to get that red lol
there's always 1 person that insists on telling everybody how to play
i know, it's just funny you dont trust black to see it
It seemed like it was taking awhile and I got scared
Appreciate the help I don’t know what I’m doing
might get it after another 1000 games
You got two good spots black
if you take 11 12 you get all 4 resources
dang dude, 3 and 4 are really small
not gonna work too well for ya
I just picked the coolest looking spot
ill give you all my green cards for ur silver cards since you like the color :)
Man that sheep port is strong
I thought this was a fair game
i can make you feel warm inside
but me red so i have to
Also yall its words in a screen
No need to get so bothered lol
dont worry. blue will trade it back to ya
so much coaching from a guy that cant get to 4
you needed to give them better advice blue
your trades are wild blue... i know i was the recipient of that last 1 but what were you thinking
